hero.headline: The Art of Private Haute Cuisine
hero.infoBox: Ultra-luxury culinary service evoking the pages of a high-end gastronomy magazine. Bespoke experiences for the discerning few.

gastronomia.heading: A Menu Taking Shape
gastronomia.body: We are building something truly exceptional. Soon you will discover a culinary selection designed for the most discerning palates — globally sourced ingredients, haute cuisine technique, and a presentation that turns every bite into a memory.

experiencias.heading: Unique Moments On Their Way
experiencias.body: Every experience we design is one of a kind. We are preparing a showcase of the most exclusive events Avá Lé Privé can orchestrate — from intimate dinners to grand celebrations in Puerto Rico's most privileged settings.

block1.heading: Artistry on a Plate
block1.body: Every dish is a canvas, every ingredient a stroke of genius. We source the rarest provisions globally, transforming them into fleeting masterpieces designed to captivate your senses before the first bite.

block2.heading: Bespoke Gatherings
block2.body: From intimate private chef dinners in your estate to lavish yacht catering, we orchestrate flawless events. Our dedicated sommeliers and white-glove service staff ensure an evening of uncompromised elegance.

items.quote: An unparalleled sensory experience. The level of detail in every dish exceeded our highest expectations.
items.name: Alejandro V.

items.quote: We hired the service for our annual gala and the execution was flawless. World-class gastronomy.
items.name: Mónica G.

items.quote: It's not just food — it's a perfect choreography between the chef, sommelier, and setting. Simply sublime.
items.name: Roberto S.

cta.heading: Let Us Design Your Next Private Experience
cta.body: Every detail, every bite, every moment — conceived exclusively for you. Share your vision and our team will transform it into an evening without precedent.

footer.rights: © 2025 Avá Lé Privé. All rights reserved.
